The '''Vodilux Star Cluster''' was the location of the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[G'aav'aar'oon]] which contained the ruins of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] fortress which was destroyed during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and later reused by the [[Nuns of G'aav'aar'oon]]. After the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces had to retreat from this cluster to replace units that were destroyed during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

{{System-stub}}
